synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20984 Oracle Linux 10 postgresql16 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20984
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20984

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20984.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
postgresql-16.10-1.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-contrib-16.10-1.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
